api.liveTestHint: Sends a minimal request and may consume a small quota
api.liveTestCompatibilityHint: Some compatible providers may reject this probe; disable it and try again if needed.
api.enableThinkingHint: Show Claude's thinking process step by step. This provides more transparency but may increase token usage.

testError.proxy_upstream_not_found: Upstream URL or route was not found. Please verify your Base URL

sandbox.title: Sandbox Environment
sandbox.wslDesc: Run commands in WSL2 Linux environment for better isolation and security on Windows.
sandbox.limaDesc: Run commands in Lima VM for better isolation and security on macOS.
sandbox.nativeDesc: Commands run directly on your system (Linux native mode).
sandbox.notReadyStatus: Sandbox enabled but not fully configured
sandbox.disabledStatus: Sandbox disabled - commands run directly on system
sandbox.wslInstallHint: Install WSL2 for better isolation. Run this command in PowerShell as Administrator:
sandbox.limaInstallHint: Install Lima for better isolation. Run this command in Terminal:
sandbox.linuxNative: Linux runs commands natively without additional sandboxing.
sandbox.helpText1: Sandbox provides an isolated environment for running commands safely.
sandbox.helpText2: WSL2 (Windows) or Lima VM (macOS) is required for full sandbox support.

mcp.addConnector: Add a connector to enable MCP tools
mcp.chromeHint: A new Chrome debug window will open automatically if port is unavailable
mcp.name: Name

credentials.encryptedDesc: Credentials are encrypted locally. The agent can use these to automatically log in to your accounts.
credentials.addCredential: Add credentials for the agent to use
credentials.name: Name
credentials.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this credential?
credentials.passwordRequired: Password is required for new credentials
credentials.usedForTokens: Used for tokens and secrets (e.g., NOTION_TOKEN)

skills.title: 📦 Skills
skills.description: Skills extend Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge and tools.
skills.installSkillsDesc: Install skills to extend Claude's capabilities
skills.pluginComponents: Components: skills {{skills}} · commands {{commands}} · agents {{agents}} · hooks {{hooks}} · mcp {{mcp}}
skills.pluginComponentsAvailableAfterInstall: Component details will be available after installation.
skills.pluginNoSkills: This plugin has no installable skills in V1
skills.pluginNoComponents: This plugin has no loadable components
skills.pluginComponentHooksDisabledByDefault: This plugin includes hooks. Hooks are disabled by default and can be enabled in manage settings after install.
skills.pluginComponentMcpDisabledByDefault: This plugin includes MCP. MCP is disabled by default and can be enabled in manage settings after install.
skills.pluginAppliedInRuntime: Plugin settings are currently applied at runtime
skills.storagePathUpdateFailed: Failed to update skills storage path
skills.storagePathOpenFailed: Failed to open skills storage path
skills.storagePathFallback: Fell back to the default skills directory. Please verify your configured path.
skills.storageWatcherError: Skills directory watcher error: {{message}} (polling fallback enabled).

logs.title: Application Logs
logs.description: View and export application logs for debugging. Logs are automatically rotated when they exceed 10MB.
logs.enableDevLogsDesc: Record detailed logs for debugging. Disable to reduce disk usage.
logs.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all log files? This action cannot be undone.
logs.helpText1: 💡 Logs are useful for debugging issues with MCP connections and other problems.
logs.helpText2: Export logs as a ZIP file to share with support or for your own analysis.

sidebar.noTasksHint: Start a new chat to begin building, researching, or editing files.
sidebar.localTasks: These tasks run locally and aren't synced across devices.

context.stepsWillShow: Steps will show as the task unfolds.
context.revealFailed: Unable to locate the file. Please check whether the path exists.

permission.warning: This action may modify your system. Review carefully.
